Summary: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Preconditions: • User account exists with email test@example.com\n• Application is accessible
Steps:
1|Navigate to the application login page||Login form is displayed
2|Enter test@example.com in the email field|test@example.com|Email is accepted
3|Enter SecurePass1 in the password field|SecurePass1|Password is masked
4|Click the Sign In button||User is redirected to dashboard
Expected Result: User successfully authenticates and accesses dashboard

Summary: Verify account lockout after 5 failed attempts
Preconditions: • User account exists with email test@example.com\n• Account is not currently locked
Steps: 1|Attempt login 5 times with incorrect password|Wrong1|Each attempt shows Invalid email or password error\n2|Attempt a 6th login with any password||Lockout message is displayed\n3|Wait 15 minutes then attempt login with correct credentials||Login succeeds
Expected Result: Account is locked after 5 failed attempts and unlocks after 15 minutes
